message:
test(webhook): pin dispatcher→transport Cx-forward contract (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Add a narrow Cx-first regression guard at the
`WebhookDispatcher → WebhookTransport` boundary. Extend the in-crate
`MockTransport` with a second captured-request bucket
(`cx_requests`) populated by a fresh `send_with_cx` override (gated
on `feature = "asupersync-runtime"`), and add the test
`dispatch_payload_with_cx_invokes_transport_cx_path`.

The test drives `WebhookDispatcher::dispatch_payload_with_cx` through
a dispatcher configured with two endpoints (Slack + Discord
templates) and asserts:

  * both endpoint deliveries are recorded and accepted,
  * `transport.cx_requests()` has two entries (proving the Cx-aware
    trait entry point was actually invoked once per endpoint),
  * `transport.requests()` is empty (proving the dispatcher did not
    silently fall back to the ambient `send()` path).

Prior to this guard, every dispatcher Cx-forward test in the suite
used `MockTransport`'s default `send_with_cx` inheritance, which
delegates to `send()`. That meant the dispatcher→transport boundary
was asserted *through* the trait default — if a future refactor of
`dispatch_payload_with_cx` regressed to calling `self.transport.send`
directly, existing tests would not have noticed. With this change,
the cx-aware and ambient paths write to separate buckets, so a
regression is impossible to hide.

Strictly additive — no existing behavior changes. The mock's new
`send_with_cx` override runs only under the `asupersync-runtime`
feature (matching the trait default gate). All existing
`MockTransport` uses continue to hit `send()` and observe their
requests via `transport.requests()`.

Pairs with the earlier tick 36 work
(`ed8895e4 feat(webhook): Cx-first trait extension +
WebhookDispatcher pipe-through`) by proving end-to-end that the
extension actually threads cx through the dispatcher.

Verification (local fork bypass):
  * webhook:: — 78 passed / 0 failed (incl. new test)
  * cargo build -p frankenterm-core --lib — clean
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean
  * No new clippy warnings on webhook.rs

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
